    U

    update(Category) - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.CategoryDatabaseRepository
    Updates an existing category in the database.

    Updates an existing transaction in the database.
    update(User) - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.UserDatabaseRepository
    Updates an existing user in the database.

    Updates an existing entity in the database.
    updateTransaction(Transaction) - Static method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.service.TransactionService
    Validates and updates an existing transaction.
    User - Class in hr.java.financemanagementsystem.model
    Represents a registered user of the application.

    Builder for creating User instances.

    Repository for managing User data in the database.

    Holds the form data for editing a user's profile.

    Holds the form data for registering a new user.

    UserService - Class in hr.java.financemanagementsystem.service
    Handles business logic for user management including registration, sign in, profile editing, password changes and account deletion.

    Thrown when user data fails validation.

    Validates user input for registration, sign in, profile editing and password changes.
